basic_info.title: Xenoblade Chronicles X
basic_info.review: Xenoblade Chronicles X offers a breathtaking open world filled with diverse biomes and engaging combat, though its story is often overshadowed by the sheer scale of exploration.

similar_games.title: The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild

play_today.details: The definitive version with enhanced visuals, improved character models, smoother performance, quality-of-life improvements including shared XP and quest tracking, plus new epilogue content. Best played on docked mode for optimal visuals.

recommended_patches.name: Cut Content Restoration Mod
recommended_patches.description: Restores dozens of unused missions, weapons, arts, and Skells that were cut from the original release. Version 1.0 is the latest stable release.

recommended_patches.name: Alternate Button Prompts
recommended_patches.description: Support for Dualshock 4, Dualsense, and Xbox One controller button prompts instead of default Switch buttons.

optimal_settings: Enable VSync for stable frame rate

play_today.details: The original release with classic presentation. Requires physical disc or emulator to play. Lacks Definitive Edition improvements.

optimal_settings: Internal resolution: 2x or higher for HD output

play_today.details: The definitive modern experience via Definitive Edition. Features native 1080p/4K support, 60 FPS performance, and significant QoL improvements like fast travel and streamlined UI. Includes all DLC and official English localization. While some fans note minor texture downgrades compared to emulated Wii U, the convenience and stability make it the best choice for most players today.

recommended_patches.name: Xenoblade Chronicles X: DE Retranslation and Uncensor Patch
recommended_patches.description: A community-made patch for the Switch Definitive Edition that restores original Japanese voice lines, fixes localization errors, and uncensors censored content like the Lizard Man sprite.

recommended_patches.name: XCX DE 60FPS Mod
recommended_patches.description: An experimental mod for the Switch version that attempts to unlock the frame rate cap beyond 30FPS, though stability varies and it may affect QTE timing.

play_today.details: The Japanese version of the original release. While it offers the same base game content as the Western release, it lacks official English localization. It is only recommended for players who can read Japanese or use specific fan translation patches, which are less stable than the official English versions. The graphical potential remains high via emulation but is hindered by language barriers for most audiences.

recommended_patches.name: XCX 60FPS Mod (Cemu Graphic Pack)
recommended_patches.description: A highly optimized graphic pack for the Wii U version running on Cemu that unlocks the frame rate to 60+ FPS and fixes QTE timing issues.

recommended_patches.name: XCX Enemy Statistics Mod
recommended_patches.description: A mod for the Wii U version (via Cemu) that allows players to adjust enemy HP, attack, and evasion stats globally for difficulty balancing.

recommended_patches.name: XCX English Fan Translation
recommended_patches.description: A community translation patch for the Japanese Wii U version to translate text to English, though less stable than the official Western release.

optimal_settings: Enable Async GPU for maximum performance
Set Internal Resolution to 4K (3840x2160) for sharp textures
Enable 'XCX 60FPS' Graphic Pack in the Cemu settings
Set CPU Accuracy to 'High' to prevent physics glitches
Enable Vulkan backend for better Linux compatibility
Set Internal Resolution to 2x or 4x based on GPU power
Disable 'Async GPU' if experiencing audio stuttering

description.synopsis: In the year 2115, humanity flees Earth to escape the alien threat known as the Zauru, settling on the planet Mira. The game follows Mio, a survivor who awakens from a coma to find the colony under attack. Players must explore the vast, alien world, customize mechs, and fight to reclaim humanity's future while uncovering the mysteries of Mira's ecosystem.
key_features: Massive open-world exploration on the planet Mira
Customizable mechs (Skells) with modular weapon systems
Real-time action combat with dodge and parry mechanics
Deep character customization including appearance and stats
Dynamic weather and day-night cycles affecting gameplay
Extensive side quests and monster hunting activities
Co-op multiplayer for specific missions and events
Photo mode for capturing in-game moments
legacy_and_impact: Xenoblade Chronicles X is remembered as a bold experiment in open-world design that prioritized exploration and customization over narrative depth. Despite being a Wii U exclusive for a decade, its cult following and critical acclaim led to a highly anticipated Switch remaster, cementing its status as a unique entry in the Xenoblade series.
